This algorithm includes all claims regardless of CLM_PMT_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: SNF_STAYS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Null/missing or 1–XXX 

COMMENT: The CLM_THRU_DT for the last claim associated with the stay must have been in the year of the data
